headline: Assessing TE Connectivity (TEL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Fair Value Signals
summary: Event context and recent share performance TE Connectivity (TEL) has been attracting attention after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$204.31 and showing negative returns over the day, week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for TE Connectivity. Despite the recent pullback, with a 7 day share price return of a 15.38% decline and a year to date share price return of a 12.40% decline, the 1 year total shareholder return of 40.00% suggests that longer term...
